strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
5x3 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E3MOM 21min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 5 @ 55 + 65%
03:00 3 @ 75%
HOLD 5 Sets
06:00 3 @ 85%
09:00 3 @ 85%
12:00 3 @ 85%
15:00 3 @ 85%
18:00 3 @ 85%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
BUY IN: 100 Double Unders
3 RFT
15 Cal Assault Bike
12 DB Bench Press
3 Rope Climbs
2 mins rest
Buy out 100 Double Unders
18 min Time Cap

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
Max Reps (aim to keep the same reps throughout each set)
Aim for 1 more rep than last week

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address posterior chain imbalances and core stability without competing with bench press, bike, and rope climbs.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 5 by 3 at 85 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 15 Cal Assault Bike, 12 DB Bench Press, 3 Rope Climbs. For hypertrophy, focus on back, hamstrings, core.
